title: Japanese Stir-Fry with Golden Peanuts
description: A quick and easy Japanese-style stir-fry recipe featuring golden peanuts as the main ingredient. This dish is perfect for a weeknight dinner.
instructions: Heat 1 tablespoon of sesame oil in a large skillet or wok over medium-high heat.
Add the peanuts and cook for 2-3 minutes, or until fragrant and lightly toasted.
Add the green onions and cook for an additional 1-2 minutes.
In a small bowl, whisk together soy sauce, sugar, salt, and black pepper.
Pour the sauce over the peanuts and green onions, and stir to combine.
Cook for an additional 1-2 minutes, or until the sauce has thickened.
Stir in the stir-fry sauce and cook for an additional 30 seconds.
Garnish with additional green onions and sesame seeds, if desired.
Serve over steamed rice or noodles, if desired.
